title: Seine River region (Manitoba) - Canada.ca
content:
## Seine River region Manitoba

## Seine River region Manitoba
Located less than an hour from Winnipeg, the Seine River region offers a rural and an urban lifestyle nearby. The community includes the municipalities of Taché, La Broquerie and Sainte-Anne. A wide variety of Francophone recreational, health and community services that help the integration of newcomers are offered.
